referenceRule: Use the attached Better Together reference only to preserve the warm palette, confident organic edge character, and visual simplicity. Do not duplicate its ring, plant, person-like stems, proportions, or composition.
globalIconPrompt:
## Better Together identity exploration - Round 4 app icon
- Deliverable: ONE finished square app-icon source, straight-on, centered, and filling the square canvas.
- Brand meaning: two people intentionally tending one living relationship.
- Audience: modern couples who want an emotionally intelligent relationship app, not a therapy clinic or wedding product.
- Style: premium editorial wellness identity; confident, memorable, warm, and modern; crisp flat vector-master geometry with a slight human-cut irregularity; no photorealism.
- Palette: ONLY warm paper #FAF8F5, coral #E5533A, deep forest #113B36, and saffron #D99A3D.
- Composition: one dominant centered silhouette; 18 percent optical safe margin; two to five foreground groups; strong contrast and readable geometry at 20 px.
- Source requirements: TRUE full-bleed square background with every corner filled; NO pre-rounded app-icon mask, rounded-square border, inset tile, transparency, mockup, device, label, caption, or presentation board.
- Originality: create an original Better Together identity. Do not imitate or reproduce any competitor, trademark, or existing app icon.
- NO gradients, glow, bevel, 3D, shadows, stock-icon finish, scenery, landscape, literal people, faces, hands, infinity sign, chain link, puzzle pieces, wedding rings, butterfly, wings, yin-yang, or decorative border.
- Text rule: when the direction requests letters, render ONLY the exact uppercase letters "BT". When the direction does not request letters, render NO text.
globalLockupPrompt:
## Better Together identity lockup - Round 4
- Use the attached generated icon as the exact visual anchor. Preserve its symbol, palette, proportions, and edge character.
- Deliverable: ONE clean square identity presentation on a full-bleed warm-paper #FAF8F5 background.
- Layout: a generous horizontal logo lockup centered in the canvas; the icon mark at left occupies about 27 percent of the width; the wordmark at right occupies about 52 percent; large clear margins.
- Required text: render the exact title-case words "Better Together" once and only once. Spell both words perfectly.
- Typography: custom editorial wordmark with confident human warmth, precise spacing, and no generic software-default appearance.
- Colors: deep forest #113B36 wordmark with one restrained coral #E5533A or saffron #D99A3D detail only when specified by the direction.
- NO tagline, slogan, extra initials, labels, captions, mockup devices, app-store badge, gradients, shadows, 3D, border, or additional copy.
- This is a logo lockup inspection image, not an advertisement or mood board.

concepts.name: BT Living Ligature
concepts.idea: A custom BT ligature makes the product name instantly ownable while a single living node signals growth.
concepts.motionLabel: B draws, T joins, living node wakes
concepts.bestFor: Strongest favicon, app icon, and social avatar route.
concepts.watchout: The letters must read BT immediately, never BR, B7, or a music symbol.
concepts.nextStep: Redraw the selected ligature on a strict grid and tune optical counters at 16 px.
concepts.iconPrompt:
## Direction - BT Living Ligature
- Background: full-bleed deep forest #113B36.
- Main mark: an unmistakable custom uppercase "BT" monogram occupying the central 62 percent. The B sits to the left and the T sits to the right. They share exactly one vertical structural stroke without overlapping into an unreadable knot.
- B construction: warm-paper #FAF8F5, with two large open counters and slightly organic outer curves.
- T construction: coral #E5533A, with one broad horizontal cap and one sturdy vertical stem.
- Connection: the B spine and T stem meet at one clean junction. Place one substantial saffron #D99A3D circular seed node at that junction.
- MUST read as the exact letters "BT" at first glance and at 20 px.
- NO other letters, leaf clip art, tree, heart, ring, badge, script lettering, lowercase letters, or flourishes.
concepts.lockupPrompt:
- Wordmark treatment: high-contrast editorial serif with softly shaped terminals that echo the B counters.
- Keep the exact icon at left. Set "Better Together" on one line.
- Use deep forest for the words and coral only for the capital B and capital T.

concepts.name: Rooted BT
concepts.idea: The initials become a compact bonsai structure: the relationship name and its living metaphor are one mark.
concepts.motionLabel: Roots settle, BT rises, leaves open
concepts.bestFor: Best balance of recognizable initials and the existing garden story.
concepts.watchout: Keep the bonsai cues integrated with the letters; reject a logo that looks like text with leaves pasted on.
concepts.nextStep: Separate roots, letterforms, and leaf tips into reusable animation layers.
concepts.iconPrompt:
## Direction - Rooted BT
- Background: full-bleed warm paper #FAF8F5.
- Main mark: two unmistakable uppercase letters "BT" built as one compact bonsai-like structure inside the central 64 percent.
- Letter B: coral #E5533A at left, bold and clearly readable, with two blunt rounded counters. Its lower terminal extends into one short root.
- Letter T: deep forest #113B36 at right, bold and clearly readable. Its vertical stem extends downward into a second separate root.
- Growth detail: exactly three compact saffron #D99A3D leaf shapes grow directly from the upper T cap, arranged as one asymmetrical bonsai crown.
- Connection: one small deep-forest joining notch links the letters at mid-height; roots remain separate.
- MUST read as exact "BT" first and bonsai second.
- NO pot, soil line, landscape, generic tree silhouette, text beyond BT, heart, ring, crest, or decorative frame.
concepts.lockupPrompt:
- Wordmark treatment: confident humanist sans with subtly flared terminals, generous spacing, and a restrained editorial feel.
- Keep the exact icon at left. Set "Better Together" on two balanced lines with Better above Together.
- Use deep forest for the words and one saffron dot after Together.

concepts.name: Heartwood Bonsai
concepts.idea: Two rooted trunks shape a clear heart in the space between them, then support one shared bonsai canopy.
concepts.motionLabel: Trunks lean, heart appears, canopy blooms
concepts.bestFor: Most emotionally direct route for couples while preserving the bonsai brand world.
concepts.watchout: The heart should emerge from the structure, not feel like a Valentine sticker on a tree.
concepts.nextStep: Tune the heart-shaped negative space and canopy silhouette for monochrome use.
concepts.iconPrompt:
## Direction - Heartwood Bonsai
- Background: full-bleed deep forest #113B36.
- Main silhouette: a compact, unmistakable bonsai symbol occupying the central 64 percent, with NO pot and NO ground line.
- Trunks: one thick coral #E5533A trunk rises from the lower left and one thick warm-paper #FAF8F5 trunk rises from the lower right. They remain separate, curve inward once, and then lean outward into the canopy.
- Heart: the clean negative space between the two inward trunk curves forms one unmistakable upright heart, about 24 percent of the symbol height. The heart is negative space, not an outlined sticker.
- Canopy: one broad warm-paper #FAF8F5 asymmetric bonsai crown spans the upper half as a single graphic mass with exactly three blunt lobes.
- Accent: one saffron #D99A3D heartwood node sits where the lower heart point meets the open trunk gap.
- NO letters, pot, scenery, roots crossing, fluffy cloud, broccoli, wedding icon, extra hearts, ring, or badge.
concepts.lockupPrompt:
- Wordmark treatment: warm editorial serif with sturdy lowercase forms and a distinctive capital B and T.
- Keep the exact icon at left. Set "Better Together" on one line.
- Use deep forest for the words and saffron for the dot of the lowercase g terminal only if visually natural.

concepts.name: Open Heart Pair
concepts.idea: Two independent relationship strokes form a recognizable heart without closing or losing their individuality.
concepts.motionLabel: Halves approach, heart holds, seed pulses
concepts.bestFor: Most universal and emotionally immediate social-sharing mark.
concepts.watchout: Keep the heart open and asymmetric enough to avoid generic dating-app territory.
concepts.nextStep: Trademark-screen the silhouette and refine the open terminals as motion endpoints.
concepts.iconPrompt:
## Direction - Open Heart Pair
- Background: full-bleed coral #E5533A.
- Main mark: one unmistakable upright heart built from TWO separate, very thick organic strokes inside the central 62 percent.
- Left half: warm paper #FAF8F5, beginning near the lower center, curving outward left, then inward toward the upper center.
- Right half: deep forest #113B36, beginning separately near the lower center, curving outward right, then inward toward the upper center.
- Open construction: leave a deliberate gap at the top center and a smaller deliberate gap at the bottom point. The two halves never touch.
- Accent: one substantial saffron #D99A3D seed sits in the central negative space, slightly below center.
- The silhouette MUST read as a heart immediately, while the separate strokes communicate two people.
- NO letters, arrowheads, infinity loop, yin-yang, chain, ring, pulse line, tiny hearts, hands, faces, or enclosing border.
concepts.lockupPrompt:
- Wordmark treatment: modern rounded humanist lettering with one subtle open terminal echoed from the heart mark.
- Keep the exact icon at left. Set "Better Together" on one line with generous spacing.
- Use deep forest for Better and coral for Together.

concepts.name: BT Editorial Signature
concepts.idea: A restrained two-letter editorial signature gives the full Better Together name a mature, scalable identity system.
concepts.motionLabel: Serifs draw, crossbar lands, signature settles
concepts.bestFor: Strongest website, editorial, merchandise, and premium-subscription identity route.
concepts.watchout: The typography must feel custom and warm, not like two letters typed in a stock font.
concepts.nextStep: Commission or draw a complete custom wordmark alphabet around the selected BT signature.
concepts.iconPrompt:
## Direction - BT Editorial Signature
- Background: full-bleed warm paper #FAF8F5.
- Main mark: the exact uppercase letters "BT" as a compact, custom high-contrast editorial serif signature occupying the central 58 percent.
- B: deep forest #113B36 with one strong vertical stem, two generous counters, and softly tapered bowl terminals.
- T: deep forest #113B36 with a broad top cap and a tapered central stem. It sits slightly higher and overlaps the B only at one short coral #E5533A shared crossbar.
- Accent: one substantial saffron #D99A3D period-like seed sits below and to the right of the T stem.
- The letters MUST be perfectly readable as "BT" with no script, swash, or ambiguity.
- NO other text, leaves, tree, heart, badge, ring, frame, lowercase letters, calligraphy, or decorative ornament.
concepts.lockupPrompt:
- Wordmark treatment: custom high-contrast editorial serif directly derived from the attached BT signature.
- Keep the exact icon at left. Set "Better Together" on one line with precise optical kerning.
- Use deep forest for the words, coral for the capital T, and a single saffron period after Together.
